offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, frequent discrepancies cause delayed financial reporting. We automate bank statement reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Frequent discrepancies in bank reconciliations lead to delayed financial reporting.
